prompt: A funny photorealistic meme-style candid outdoor photo of three well-known tech CEOs standing close together in an awkward, emotionally loaded triangle. On the left foreground, {argument name="left person name" default="Sam Altman"} is shown in a close-up three-quarter view, with dark curly hair, light skin, a dark crewneck shirt, and an exaggerated smug, pleased, slightly teary-eyed grin as he looks toward the man on the right. In the center background, {argument name="center person name" default="Satya Nadella"} stands between them, bald with glasses, medium-brown skin, wearing a dark zip-up jacket, giving a calm, knowing, faintly amused smile while looking toward the man on the right. On the right foreground, {argument name="right person name" default="Elon Musk"} is seen mostly from the back and side, with short dark hair and a black leather jacket, his face largely turned away from the camera. A large hand from the left person rests on the right person’s shoulder in the foreground, creating the comedic tension. Use a shallow depth of field, natural overcast daylight, soft realistic skin texture, and documentary-style photography. Add exactly 3 bold white meme labels with thick black outline placed near each person: {argument name="left label" default="Sam Altman"} at the lower left near the left man, {argument name="center label" default="Satya Nadella"} above the center man’s head, and {argument name="right label" default="Elon Musk"} at the lower right near the right man. Landscape composition, tight crop on faces and shoulder, realistic proportions, internet meme energy.
translatedPrompt: 一张有趣的写实风格模因式户外抓拍照，三位知名科技公司 CEO 紧挨在一起，呈现出一种尴尬且充满情绪张力的三角关系。左侧前景中，{argument name="left person name" default="Sam Altman"} 以四分之三侧面特写出镜，留着深色卷发，肤色较浅，身穿深色圆领衫，脸上带着夸张、自鸣得意、略显泪眼婆娑的笑容，望向右侧的男子。背景中央，{argument name="center person name" default="Satya Nadella"} 站在两人之间，秃顶并戴着眼镜，中等棕色肤色，身穿深色拉链夹克，表情冷静、心知肚明且带着一丝戏谑的微笑，看向右侧的男子。右侧前景中，{argument name="right person name" default="Elon Musk"} 主要以背影和侧面示人，留着深色短发，身穿黑色皮夹克，脸部大部分背对镜头。左侧男子的一只大手搭在右侧男子的肩膀上，营造出喜剧性的张力。采用浅景深、自然阴天光线、柔和真实的皮肤纹理以及纪实摄影风格。在每个人物附近添加 3 个带有粗黑色轮廓的加粗白色模因标签：左下角靠近左侧男子的 {argument name="left label" default="Sam Altman"}，中心男子头顶上方的 {argument name="center label" default="Satya Nadella"}，以及右下角靠近右侧男子的 {argument name="right label" default="Elon Musk"}。横向构图，紧凑的面部和肩部剪裁，比例真实，充满互联网模因感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 科技公司 CEO 尴尬梗图：此提示词可生成一张带有面部标签的写实风格三人科技梗图，适用于社交媒体调侃和互联网风格的反应表情包。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: overcast, shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
